La Boom Los Angeles has been dominating the nightlife scene for over a decade, showcasing the best events and concerts. Our venue has undergone a complete makeover and offers top-notch facilities, ensuring a memorable and unique night out with a large capacity for guests to enjoy. We offer a wide range of drinks, including domestic and imported beers, and our restaurant serves delicious Mexican snacks and seafood, ensuring a pleasant evening while you enjoy the best mixed music on our three dance floors.

La Boom is a must-visit nightclub for an amazing night out, welcoming guests aged 18 and above, and is open from Thursday to Sunday.

We also offer reservation services so you can come and celebrate your birthday with us.

Bahia Hollywood

Having been a cornerstone of Los Angeles' vibrant nightlife since 1974, Bahia offers an exceptional mix of live entertainment and dining, making it a must-visit destination every Friday, Saturday, and Sunday. The club celebrates its historical significance by continually evolving, marked by its recent expansion into Hollywood. At Bahia Hollywood, located at 6506 Hollywood Blvd, guests can expect the same cherished atmosphere but with a fresh twist. With the upcoming Valentine's Weekend, Bahia promises special events, including performances by the Azúcar Latin Band, showcasing the rich cultural tapestry that has endeared it to LA for over 50 years. Their dedication to providing memorable experiences is evident, making each visit remarkable. Follow Bahia for the latest on events and celebrate the legacy that keeps growing.

review this club in 100 wrds - soundnightclub
Sound’s layout provides an ideal venue for private and corporate events of all types and sizes. Sound is located in the heart of Hollywood, within walking distance from most major theaters, making it an ideal place for premiere and after-parties. Our talented, in-house event production team can create a unique environment just for your party, from décor, to florals, to table-scapes, to gobos, and more. We guarantee you a successful and memorable event when you book it at Sound.

Blending modern décor with raw, industrial touches, Sound presents modern creative concepts, such as an expansive sunken dance floor, elevated DJ booth, spacious private tables with unparalleled sightlines to the stage, and cutting edge audiovisual and lighting designs throughout.

Highlighted features of Sound’s 8,000 square foot space include: multiple full-service bars, gourmet kitchen for onsite catering, oversized booths and recessed seating, changeable silk display panels on the club’s facade, and a first-of-its-kind Pioneer sound system. Projection screens with state-of-the-art 3D projection mapping are also strategically placed throughout the club, and can display custom branding or video reels. Refurbished wood paneling from Frank Sinatra’s previous home and stairway railings salvaged from a Colorado railroad track are just the start of the unique and detailed interior of this beautiful venue.

Sound Nightclub, situated in Hollywood's pulsating heart, stands out as an exceptional venue for both private and corporate gatherings. Its proximity to major theaters makes it a prime spot for premiere and after-parties. With a talented in-house event production team, Sound can transform its space to suit any event theme, offering services from décor to advanced lighting and sound. The club merges modern design with industrial elements, featuring a unique sunken dance floor, an elevated DJ booth for an immersive audio experience, spacious tables offering prime views, and a pioneering sound system. The 8,000 square foot space boasts various amenities including full-service bars, an onsite gourmet kitchen, and unique decor elements like refurbished wood from Frank Sinatra’s home. With projection screens and 3D mapping available, Sound not only promises but delivers a memorable event experience.

next review 100 wrsd club - Located on a relatively quiet side street off Hollywood Boulevard is one of Hollywood’s oldest gathering spot.  Established in 1927 and named after the famous hit song ‘My Blue Heaven’, and actually owned by the famous hit songwriter himself Gene Austin.  Through Prohibition AS Morressy’s Hair Salon before becoming the Legendary Boardner’s in 1942 when Steve Boardner lost his lease in the Cross Roads of the World, he relocated Boardner’s bar to 1652 N. Cherokee where it still stands today.  This long time Institution has endured much from Man to Acts of God, and still continues to thrive as one of the most welcoming and comfortable watering hole’s in Hollywood.

Through card gambling, prohibition, the depression, the rock n’roll explosion of the 1980’s and the Hollywood Redevelopment, generations have made their mark on Boardner’s.  Hollywood’s constant change and rapid growth seems to evolve around Boardner’s as it is discreetly located and its low-key unassuming appearance.  Yet you step inside of Boardner’s and a jukebox plays popular hits just loud enough to bring in a good time mood amongst good conversation.  In addition to the main bar area, Boardner’s offers a secluded outdoor patio complete with a full bar and stage for live performances… or one might just enjoy a sunny afternoon in Hollywood with a cold beverage and one of the best burgers in town!  Boardner’s recent expansion incorporates a huge dance floor, fully equipped dj booth and state of the art PA System, VIP lounge with an awesome view of the entire venue and three full bars which all makes for a full house of fun!  Frequented by neighborhood residents, Hollywood movie stars, and an occasional tourist, Boardner’s stands as a pillar to the community.

Nestled on a quiet side street off the bustling Hollywood Boulevard lies Boardner's, a historic gem in Hollywood's nightlife since 1927. Originally named after Gene Austin's hit 'My Blue Heaven', Boardner's has witnessed the ebb and flow of Hollywood through Prohibition, the Great Depression, and the rock 'n' roll surge of the 1980s, yet it remains a beloved spot. This institution, often seen as a refreshing anomaly amidst Hollywood's rapid changes, offers a blend of history and comfort, making it a favorite gathering place. Within its walls, a jukebox sets the mood, complementing lively conversations. Besides its main bar, Boardner's boasts a serene outdoor patio with a bar and stage for live performances. Its recent expansion added a spacious dance floor, a DJ booth with top-notch audio, and a VIP lounge, enhancing its appeal. Boardner's has become a cornerstone for locals, celebrities, and the occasional tourist, emphasizing its role as a community pillar with an unassuming charm.

next 100 wrtds review on club - Catch One is one of LA’s largest and most versatile event spaces. With 6 rooms ranging from 50-1200 capacity, which creates a full venue occupancy of over 2000 guests, they can be combined to fit any size group or budget. This location offers a full bar, incredible A/V with lighting packages, in-house catering, and unmatched space vertility. Catch One is the perfect spot for events of all kinds.

Catch One stands out as a premier venue in LA for its sheer size and adaptability, catering to a wide array of events. Its unique layout includes six distinct rooms, accommodating groups ranging from 50 to an impressive 1200 people, allowing for a total venue capacity exceeding 2000 guests. This flexibility makes it an ideal choice regardless of the event's size or budget. The venue prides itself on its comprehensive offerings, including a fully stocked bar, advanced audiovisual and lighting options, in-house catering services, and unparalleled spatial versatility. Whether for intimate gatherings or large scale celebrations, Catch One promises an unforgettable experience, making it a go-to destination for event planners and party-goers alike.

It offers a variety of amenities including a stage for live performances, a dance floor, outdoor seating, and a full-service bar. The venue is known for its lively atmosphere and top-notch service. Many visitors have praised the club's sound system and the quality of the performances. However, some have also criticized the prices, which can be quite expensive. Overall, it is a popular destination for those looking to have a good time in Mexico City.

Los Candiles Night Club, nestled in the bustling core of Mexico City, emerges as a beloved destination for nightlife aficionados. It is celebrated for its comprehensive range of amenities such as an engaging stage for live performances, an inviting dance floor, comfortable outdoor seating, and a well-equipped full-service bar. The club is synonymous with a vibrant ambiance and exceptional service, winning the hearts of many patrons. Guests often commend the club for its impressive sound system and the high quality of its live acts, ensuring an unforgettable night out. However, it's worth noting that the experience comes with a higher price tag, a minor caveat for some visitors. Despite this, Los Candiles remains a sought-after spot for an exhilarating evening in Mexico City.

This gay-friendly nightspot, adorned with a unique Latin cowboy theme, impresses with its eclectic mix of drag shows and live bands. Offering dine-in without the option for delivery, it stands out for its swift service and notable drinks selection including beers, cocktails, and wines, alongside a live music ambiance. With an array of offerings from alcohol to happy hour specials, and even dancing, there's something for everyone. The venue, cozy and casual, features rooftop seating and karaoke, creating a welcoming environment for groups, tourists, and particularly the LGBTQ+ community, serving as a safe space for transgender individuals. Accepting reservations and various payment options, this spot ensures a convenient and memorable outing.

next 100 wrds review on - takamisushi
A sushi rooftop experience. Takami Sushi & Robata sits on the 21st floor surrounded by Downtown L.A. Witness the delicacy of the sushi roll as our sushi chefs prepare your plates at our sushi bar. Live in luxury as you enjoy our specialty Robatas and entrees with the view of downtown L.A.’s most beautiful high rises. 

Lose yourself in our decorated cocktails, indulge in the variety of our Sake options & choose from our beautifully displayed wines and champagnes in our glass cellar. Takami Sushi & Robata, an unforgettable evening.

Takami Sushi & Robata offers an unparalleled sushi rooftop dining experience on the 21st floor, with breathtaking views of Downtown L.A.'s skyline. This exquisite venue invites guests to observe the artistry of sushi making directly at the sushi bar, where skilled chefs prepare sumptuous rolls. The luxury extends to its specialty Robatas and entrees, further elevating the dining experience against the backdrop of L.A.’s architectural wonders. Guests can also immerse themselves in a curated selection of decorated cocktails, diverse Sake choices, and premium wines and champagnes showcased in a striking glass cellar. For a memorable evening that combines culinary delicacy with opulent ambience, Takami Sushi & Robata is a destination not to be missed.

next 100 wrds on club - Circa is a hotel and casino located in Las Vegas, on the west side of the city at 4400 Paradise Rd. It opened in 1993 and features a modern design and a unique circular shape. The hotel has a variety of amenities, including a spa, several dining options, and several entertainment venues. It is known for its comfortable and stylish accommodations, as well as its luxurious amenities. The hotel is located in a prime location, near many popular attractions and landmarks in Las Vegas.

Circa, nestled at 4400 Paradise Rd in Las Vegas, stands out not just for its prime location but also for its distinctive modern architecture and captivating circular design since its opening in 1993. This hotel and casino caters to those seeking the quintessence of comfort and luxury, offering a plethora of amenities to ensure a memorable stay. Guests can indulge in rejuvenating spa treatments, explore a variety of dining options that cater to all culinary tastes, and enjoy an array of entertainment venues all under one roof. Known for its stylish accommodations and upscale amenities, Circa is perfectly positioned near many of Las Vegas's iconic attractions and landmarks, making it an ideal choice for travelers looking to experience the vibrancy and excitement of the city.

next 100 wrds review on club - The Room is a Hollywood original, a bar with real substance. Low-key, quality venue which sets itself apart from trendy pop-ups that come and go. A mainstay in Hollywood nightlife since 1993.

The Room, tucked away in the bustling heart of Hollywood, stands as a testament to timeless class and understated quality. Unlike the ephemeral wave of trendy pop-ups, this bar has carved its niche as a steadfast haven in the ever-changing landscape of nightlife since its inception in 1993. Its low-key vibe attracts a discerning clientele that appreciates the essence of a genuinely good night out without the usual fanfare. Praised for its relaxed atmosphere and enduring presence, The Room offers a sanctuary for those seeking refuge from the flash and clamor of typical Hollywood bars. A true original, it continues to set the standard for quality and authenticity in a scene crowded with fleeting attractions.

100 wrds review on - Warwick, formerly known as Club L, is a unique blend of rustic cocktail lounge and Hollywood club, housed in a sprawling warehouse adorned with exposed brick, cozy fireplaces, and unfinished ceilings. The concept behind Warwick is elegantly simple yet challenging to pull off—to infuse the typical glitz and glam of a Hollywood club with an indie, raw vibe, while also elevating the drinking experience with top-notch seasonal craft cocktails crafted from premium spirits and high-quality ingredients.

Responsible for the exceptional bar program, which they aptly call it, are the renowned mixologists Jason Bran and Damian Windsor. These experts have undoubtedly treated you to their exceptional libations over the past four years at The Roger Room.

While patrons can always place their drink orders at one of the venue’s multiple bars, those who opt for a reserved table will enjoy an unparalleled tableside cocktail service. Each table comes with a dedicated cocktail attendant, ensuring that drinks flow seamlessly throughout the night. Expect an array of premium spirits, freshly squeezed juices, housemade syrups or bitters, seasonal garnishes, and even innovative housemade “foams.” Depending on the chosen cocktail, you may be treated to the luxury of fancy ice, crafted to complement and elevate the overall drinking experience.

Warwick, evolving from its origins as Club L, strikes a captivating balance as a venue that fuses the raw edginess of an indie space with the upscale allure of a Hollywood club. Set within a vast warehouse space, its design boasts exposed brickwork, inviting fireplaces, and rustic, unfinished ceilings, setting a unique ambiance that diverges from the conventional club scene. Spearheading the venue's distinguished bar program are acclaimed mixologists Jason Bran and Damian Windsor, whose innovative craft cocktails have been a staple of enjoyment. Warwick elevates the typical night out with seasonal concoctions made from the finest ingredients and spirits, served amidst an effortlessly chic setting.

Table reservation at Warwick not only guarantees a spot in this exclusive environment but also introduces patrons to an exceptional tableside service, highlighted by a bespoke cocktail experience. Guests can savor an assortment of high-quality drinks, featuring everything from fresh juices and homemade syrups to meticulously chosen garnishes and cutting-edge "foams." The attention to detail extends to the ice used in the cocktails, ensuring every element enhances the drink's flavor and presentation. Warwick redefines nightlife, combining meticulous mixology with an ambiance that’s both sophisticated and authentically eclectic.
